headline: Apollo Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: NEW YORK, May 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO) (together with its consolidated subsidiaries, “Apollo”) today reported results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026. Marc Rowan, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer at Apollo said, “Our first quarter results set a strong tone for the year, with record fee-related earnings and assets under management surpassing $1 trillion – a testament to the trust our clients place in us and a reminder of the value we c
